name: GitHub repositories should not have open high or critical code scanning alerts
description: Repositories with open high or critical GitHub code scanning alerts
body:
### Security intent

This control flags repositories where GitHub reports open high or critical code scanning alerts, such as CodeQL or other configured scanner findings.

### Assessment context

Cyscale imports GitHub code scanning alert metadata and assesses the repository as failing while one or more high or critical code scanning alerts remain open.
remediationDescription:
## Remediation

Review the code scanning alert in GitHub, fix the vulnerable code path or configuration issue, and merge the remediation through the normal pull request workflow. Dismiss only false positives with a documented reason.
